description: Good things come in small packages ...but GREAT things come in MINIS!  Designed for those-on-the-go these MINIs come in three fruity flavours - Cherry, Strawberry and Pineapple Mint - all with SPF.  Perfect for your bag, your desk, your pocket, kids, and that partner who "borrows" your lip balm!
product_name: Carmex Mins Lip Balm Tubes SPF 15 3 x 5g
